extraction.one_line_summary: ASGREEN Kasper bridged solo to EVENPOEL with 1.7km remaining after Quick-Step controlled bonus sprint, won stage sprint while EVENPOEL took GC lead
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck Quick-Step controlled bonus sprint then immediately counter-attacked via BUCHMANN, forcing rivals to choose which move to chase
EVENPOEL's solo surge after bonus sprint forced MAS into decision paralysis; chose wrong wheel and lost race
Team UAE put entire squad on front 40km out despite no GC threat, burned matches for eliminated sprinter ACKERMANN

rider_signals.EVENPOEL Remco: positive: Sustained solo power after bonus sprint until ASGREEN bridged suggests diesel engine strength unusual for his profile
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: Lost contact as overnight leader when Quick-Step accelerated, vulnerability on punchy circuits with multiple passes
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: Dropped on initial climb at 50km despite team setting tempo, questions his viability in rolling stage races
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: Hesitated between chasing BUCHMANN or EVENPOEL attacks, tactical indecision cost him contention in select group finish
